message.reasoning_content:
The user wants a greeting in exactly three words.
Simple request.
I need to ensure the response is counted correctly.
"Hello to you" (3 words)
"Hello, how are" (3 words - a bit grammatically weird)
"Hello, friend says" (3 words - weird)
"Hi there now" (3 words)
"Hello world today" (3 words)

Let's go with a standard, friendly 3-word greeting.
"Hello there friend" - 3 words.
"Hi there, friend" - Hi (1) there (2) friend (3). Punctuation doesn't count as words usually.
"Hello to you." - 3 words.

Let's keep it simple and direct.
"Hello to you." or "Hello there friend."
I will use "Hello to you."
